note: Reviewer subagents were not callable from the agent context (no Task/SendMessage tool surfaced). The producing agent performed a structured self-review against the test-master methodology. This report should be re-run by the team lead with the actual dev-test-reviewer subagent before merging.

tdd_anchors_check.TestReadProcPidStatSpaceInComm: present, asserts Utime=1500, Stime=750 from a (my proc name) golden file
tdd_anchors_check.TestReadProcPidStatNormalComm: present, asserts Utime=2500, Stime=1250 from a (bash) golden file
tdd_anchors_check.TestReadProcPidStatMalformed: present, asserts error returned and zero ProcPidStat
tdd_anchors_check.TestReadProcPidIOMissingKey: present, asserts error returned and zero ProcPidIO
tdd_anchors_check.TestReadProcPidStatIntegration: present, calls readProcPidStat(os.Getpid()) and asserts Utime+Stime >= 0
tdd_anchors_check.TestReadProcPidIOIntegration: present, calls readProcPidIO(os.Getpid()) and asserts ReadBytes+WriteBytes >= 0

extra_coverage: TestReadProcPidStatFileMissing — covers os.Open error path for stat reader
TestReadProcPidIOFileMissing — covers os.Open error path for io reader
test_pyramid_position: Unit tests with golden files dominate; integration tests are kept minimal (os.Getpid only) to avoid environmental coupling. Matches existing internal/stat/ test conventions (cpu_test.go).
verify_command_check: TestCheckIOAvailable does not match the -run ProcPid regex from the task verify clause. The test still runs under default `go test` and `make test`. Documented in decisions.md.
